input_context.task_spec:
# Task 1.3: Set up .gitignore

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .gitignore exists in project root
- Contains Go binary patterns (*.exe, *.so, *.dylib)
- Contains build artifact patterns (/build/bin/)
- Contains frontend/node_modules/
- Contains OS patterns (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db)
- Contains editor patterns (.vscode/, .idea/)
- Contains env patterns (.env, .env.local)
- git status --ignored shows build/ and node_modules/ ignored
input_context.implementation:
File: /home/sblanken/code/paa5/.gitignore (45 lines)

Contains:
- build/bin, node_modules, frontend/dist (Wails defaults)
- Go binaries: *.exe, *.dll, *.so, *.dylib, *.bin
- Go workspace: go.work, go.work.sum
- Vendor: vendor/
- OS: .DS_Store, Thumbs.db, desktop.ini
- Editor: .vscode/, .idea/, *.swp, *.swo, *~
- Env: .env, .env.local, .env.*.local
- Logs: *.log, logs/
- Testing: coverage.out, coverage.html, coverage/

verification_commands.git status --ignored: Should show build/bin and node_modules as ignored
